# Offer Fabrications

> Offer Fabrications is a metal fabrication workshop in Bibra Lake, Perth, Western Australia. We design and build custom steel, stainless steel and aluminium fabrication — including MIG & TIG welding, CNC cutting and folding, and production manufacturing — for mining, industrial, commercial and trade clients. We handle one-off custom jobs and low-to-medium production runs, fabricated in-house and delivered across WA.

Offer Fabrications is a workshop-based fabricator (not an on-site installer): we build in our Bibra Lake workshop and deliver or arrange transport for completed projects across Perth and Western Australia, including the Pilbara and Goldfields mining regions.

## What we do
- [Custom steel fabrication](https://offerfabrications.com.au/#services): Mild and structural steel — frames, brackets, platforms, chutes, guards and bespoke one-off components.
- [Stainless steel fabrication](https://offerfabrications.com.au/#services): Food-grade, marine and architectural stainless — benches, cabinets, tanks, hoppers, pipework and corrosion-resistant assemblies.
- [Aluminium fabrication](https://offerfabrications.com.au/#services): Lightweight, corrosion-resistant aluminium — canopies, marine components, enclosures, panels and frames.
- [CNC cutting & folding](https://offerfabrications.com.au/#services): Precision sheet metal cutting, folding and forming for accurate, repeatable components.
- [MIG & TIG welding](https://offerfabrications.com.au/#services): High-quality MIG and TIG welding across steel, stainless steel and aluminium.
- [Production manufacturing](https://offerfabrications.com.au/#services): Low-to-medium volume production runs with consistent quality and repeatable processes.

## Industries served
- Mining & resources, oil & gas, construction, marine, civil & infrastructure, commercial & trade — across Western Australia.

## Key pages
- [Home](https://offerfabrications.com.au/): Overview of Offer Fabrications, capabilities and recent work.
- [Recent work](https://offerfabrications.com.au/#work): Photos of real fabrication from the Bibra Lake workshop.
- [FAQ](https://offerfabrications.com.au/#faq): Common questions on materials, services, areas served, quoting and welding.
- [Get a quote](https://offerfabrications.com.au/#contact): Send a drawing, sketch or photo for a quote.
